summary: Comprehensive testing of Seva Setu Bot completed. All backend APIs (100% - 12/12 tests passed) and frontend functionality verified. No critical issues found. App is production-ready.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend API Health Check - /api/ returns running status
✅ Super Admin Login - superadmin@sarthak.ai / Admin@2025 works
✅ Super Admin Invalid Credentials - returns 401
✅ Consular Chat Basic Message - returns AI response
✅ Consular Chat Passport Query - returns detailed passport info
✅ Consular Chat Session Persistence - maintains session across messages
✅ Consular Chat Hindi Language - supports Hindi queries
✅ Consular Session Not Found - returns 404 for invalid session
✅ Consular Session After Chat - retrieves session with messages
✅ Form Submission - successfully submits form data
✅ User Registration and Login - creates user and authenticates
✅ User Invalid Login - returns 401 for wrong credentials
✅ Landing Page - loads with all UI elements (heading, feature cards, buttons)
✅ Consular Bot Page - loads with progress stepper, avatar, chat interface
✅ Chat Functionality - sends message, shows typing indicator, receives AI response
✅ Camera Dialog - opens and closes correctly with capture/cancel buttons
✅ File Upload Button - triggers file input correctly
✅ Voice Toggle - toggles between enabled/disabled states
✅ Super Admin Dashboard - displays analytics (Companies, Sessions, Documents)
✅ Navigation - all page transitions work correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified working: Landing page, Consular Bot chat with AI (GPT-5.2), typing indicator, voice toggle, camera dialog, file upload, Super Admin login/dashboard, navigation. Backend pytest suite created at /app/backend/tests/test_seva_setu_api.py for regression testing.

mocked_apis.avatar_video: Avatar video is a placeholder image. Full video avatar with lip-sync available with Akool.com upgrade (noted in UI)
